fields.name: backgroundColor
fields.label: Background Color
fields.description: Hex color for the navigation bar background (e.g., #000000)

fields.name: textColor
fields.label: Text Color
fields.description: Hex color for the navigation text (e.g., #ffffff)

fields.name: hoverAccentColor
fields.label: Hover Accent Color
fields.description: Hex color for the hover underline accent (e.g., #fefefe)

fields.name: breadcrumb
fields.label: Breadcrumb
fields.description: Optional breadcrumb trail with links separated by >. Example: Home > Category > Page

fields.name: categoryName
fields.label: Category Name
fields.description: Top-level navigation category name (e.g., Aviation Parts)

fields.name: subLink1Label
fields.label: Sub-Link 1 Label
fields.description: Label for the first sub-navigation link

fields.name: subLink1Url
fields.label: Sub-Link 1 URL
fields.description: URL path for the first sub-navigation link (e.g., /plp/tires)

fields.name: subLink2Label
fields.label: Sub-Link 2 Label
fields.description: Label for the second sub-navigation link (optional)

fields.name: subLink2Url
fields.label: Sub-Link 2 URL
fields.description: URL path for the second sub-navigation link

fields.name: subLink3Label
fields.label: Sub-Link 3 Label
fields.description: Label for the third sub-navigation link (optional)

fields.name: subLink3Url
fields.label: Sub-Link 3 URL
fields.description: URL path for the third sub-navigation link

fields.name: subLink4Label
fields.label: Sub-Link 4 Label
fields.description: Label for the fourth sub-navigation link (optional)

fields.name: subLink4Url
fields.label: Sub-Link 4 URL
fields.description: URL path for the fourth sub-navigation link

fields.name: subLink5Label
fields.label: Sub-Link 5 Label
fields.description: Label for the fifth sub-navigation link (optional)

fields.name: subLink5Url
fields.label: Sub-Link 5 URL
fields.description: URL path for the fifth sub-navigation link

fields.name: subLink6Label
fields.label: Sub-Link 6 Label
fields.description: Label for the sixth sub-navigation link (optional)

fields.name: subLink6Url
fields.label: Sub-Link 6 URL
fields.description: URL path for the sixth sub-navigation link
